rationale: The cited 2008 JMR paper introduces a methodological approach to measuring response styles (IRT-based extreme response style, cross-national), and the citing 2010 JMR paper is also a methodological paper on modeling response styles and correcting style/content confounding. The notes show strong construct and method overlap (response styles, cross-national survey ratings, correction/measurement methods), so this citation is plausibly substantive rather than a generic mention even though only DOI-level match evidence is available.
